\tzpentry{ID3827}{Mu Haar Hmagnetic Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3827 introduces Mu Haar Hmagnetic Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[Mu]Haar]; Hmagnetic= DirectSum[Table[BasisVector[n], {n, 0, Infinity}]]; Hphoton = DirectSum[Table[BasisVector[{k, \[Sigma]}], {k, MomentumSpace}, {\[Sigma], {L, R}}]]; Htotal = TensorProduct[Hgyro, Hmagnetic, Hphoton]; \end{implementation} \subsection{Tunneling Hamiltonian and Instanton Action} \begin{definition}[Tunneling Hamiltonian] Define the tunneling Hamiltonian acting on the flux degree of freedom by \[ H_{\text{tunnel}} = \hbar\omega_0\,a^\dagger a + \frac{\hbar^2}{2m_{\text{eff}}}\,\partial_d^2 + V(d) + g_{\text{tunnel}}\,(a^\dagger + a)(\partial_d + \partial_d^\dagger), \]
